user_query: I'm organizing a gaming event and I'm looking for sponsors. Can you provide me with the latest news in the gaming industry, particularly in the Diablo 4 game? Additionally, I'm interested in the different races and factions in the Hearthstone game. Could you give me an overview of these?

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest news related to the gaming industry, focusing on Diablo 4.
Gather an overview of the different races and factions in the Hearthstone game.
